summary: Iter22c verification: removed stale 'coming soon' messaging for Heatmaps add-on across Analytics sub-tab, Landing page, and dashboard Roadmap. All requested flows passed.
verified_flows: Public Landing (logged out): 'Web analytics' bento card → inner 'Heatmap' tab no longer carries a 'soon' badge (outerHTML scanned, no 'soon' substring).
Public Landing 'Shipping next' roadmap teaser: body text no longer mentions 'Native heatmaps'; it now mentions 'Session replays' (rrweb).
[data-testid='analytics-subtab-heatmaps'] no longer contains a 'soon' badge (DOM-level check).

Heatmaps sub-tab ACTIVE state renders: 'Heatmaps are live' heading, [data-testid='heatmaps-open-full-viewer'] visible, [data-testid='heatmaps-summary-pages'] table present, 3 stat tiles (Total events / Clicks / Rage clicks) rendered (CSS-uppercased).
Click 'heatmaps-open-full-viewer' → URL navigates to /app/apps/{id}/heatmaps and [data-testid='heatmaps-page'] renders.
Regression: tab-addons still renders [data-testid='app-addons'] with [data-testid='addon-card-heatmaps'] showing 'active'.

Dashboard /app/roadmap: no [data-testid='roadmap-feature-heatmaps'] tile present; [data-testid='roadmap-feature-session-replays'] is present under Analytics & Insights category (title 'Session replays').
critical_code_review_comments: Console still emits Recharts ResponsiveContainer width(-1)/height(-1) warnings on Landing (unchanged from prior iters, non-blocking).
Two background 401 console errors during Landing (likely /api/me probe while logged-out) — cosmetic but worth silencing in api client interceptor.
seed_data_creation: None — relied on existing seeded demo workspace/app with heatmaps add-on already active and one tracked URL.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter22c verified — stale 'coming soon' references for Heatmaps removed from AppWebAnalyticsTab SUB_TABS heatmaps entry (no soon flag), HeatmapsPane shows active state with open-full-viewer CTA, Landing analytics bento Heatmap tab + Roadmap teaser swapped to Session replays (rrweb), and dashboard Roadmap feature swapped to session-replays. Demo's first app id 63c1ba3c-8286-4e80-83d1-06a603132392 currently has heatmaps active so HeatmapsPane renders the ACTIVE branch (not the enable CTA).
